description: Creates an interactive p5.js canvas at a grid position. The user writes JavaScript in a Script Editor (opened by clicking the canvas). The script has access to standard p5.js drawing functions (rect, ellipse, line, text, fill, stroke, background, etc.) plus custom Point2Space APIs: pvector, distanceMarker, curveMarker, angleMarker, phaseStepper, bridge, effect, and physics (enablePhysics, circleBody, rectBody, groundBody, updateRef, applyForce, setVelocity, removeBody). Call canvas() in setup() to initialize the drawing surface. Use the fields proxy to read/write studio expression variables (e.g. fields.a reads variable a).
utility: Create an interactive p5.js scripting canvas

arguments.name: position
arguments.description: Canvas position on the studio grid

arguments.name: viewSize
arguments.description: Canvas size in grid units (default: view(20, 6))

examples.scenario: Physics simulation with bouncing ball synced to a g2d point
examples.expression:
graph_1 = g2d(at(2.9, 29.6), 20, 20, range(-1, 5), range(-1, 5), type(plotting))
point_1 = point(graph_1, 2.2, 4.2, c(crimson), fc(gold))
sketch_1 = p5sheet(at(3, 4.2), view(20, 20), range(-5, 5), range(0, 5), p5_script_1)
